name: Summon Over
desc: Each time a monster(s) is Special Summoned, place 1 Summon Counter on this card (max. 6). This card with 6 Summon Counters cannot be destroyed by card effects. At the start of each Main Phase 1, if this card has 6 Summon Counters: The turn player can activate this effect; they send this card to the GY, and if they do, they send all Special Summoned monsters their opponent controls to the GY.
eff: Each time a monster(s) is Special Summoned, place 1 Summon Counter on this card (max. 6). This card with 6 Summon Counters cannot be destroyed by card effects. At the start of each Main Phase 1, if this card has 6 Summon Counters: The turn player can activate this effect; they send this card to the GY, and if they do, they send all Special Summoned monsters their opponent controls to the GY.

action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard
Sends from your opponent's field to your opponent's Graveyard
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
misc: At the start of Main Phase 1
